PostToolUse.description: Build runner reminder: warns when a code-generated file (datasource, response, request) is modified, reminding to run build_runner

hooks.command: bash -c 'f="${CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS:-}"; if [ -n "$f" ]; then for file in $f; do if [[ "$file" == *.dart ]] && [[ "$file" == *datasource* || "$file" == *data_source* || "$file" == *_response.dart || "$file" == *_request.dart ]]; then echo "⚠️  Code-generated file modified. Run: dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs"; break; fi; done; fi; exit 0'
